Here's a small collection of slighty lewd memes. Some are probably from the Imgur collective, but I have other sources.
(Read right to left)
WTF Disney
Sounds fair to me.
No need to confirm or deny, lol. I had a few other pictures I wanted to include, but couldn't find them, maybe next time?
item.dc:creator: SuperMermaidNinja2Turbo

item.title: The decline and fall of Imgur
item.description:
We've all noticed that posts on the front page are getting fewer and fewer upvotes. Well, here are some numbers showing just how bad it is. This is a sample of over 7800 posts from the Imgur frontpage over the past six years. I've clipped the graph at 5000 upvotes, so there are about 150 posts not visible here, but they were practically all before mid 2021.
Here's the number of views each post got. This is a logarithmic view, so even a slight dip or lift represents a huge decrease or increase in activity. Check out the uplift when the pandemic hit! You can see that everything was ticking along nicely until mid-2023, and then something horrible started to happen. What the heck happened around April or May 2023? Any theories?
For you beautiful fellow nerds who're skeptical of the data or would like to reproduce it: good for you. Critique welcome. Here's how I gathered it: I set the frontpage to Most Viral / Random, opened my browser devtools, reloaded the page, held down PgDn for a minute or two. Saved the history as a HAR file, digested it into CSV with a quick Python script https://pastebin.com/mtxcBSfv, dumped that into Google Sheets to make the graphs.
Cat tax: someone had left a cardboard box outside the door of my local small supermarket, with obvious consequences.
item.dc:creator: TheDildoOfConsequences

item.title: Faye Valentine - Cowboy Bebop Cosplay
item.description: Had a blast recreating some Faye poses with this cosplay! I pulled a ton of them direct from the series then had the pics on my phone so I could get the whole vibe of the character. Really hoping to do that with all my cosplays moving forward cause it was such a fun way to do a shoot!! Also, the rumors are true, check out my new YouTube channel when you get a chance, I have an upcoming DC Film Costume Critique I think you all are going to love!: https://www.youtube.com/@AlsoAshleyB
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: RIP to my friend.
item.description:
About 20 years ago I was being a nerd and I sent a fanmail to this man. Peter Kwong. I just told him how cool I thought he was in Big Trouble in Little China, and then I signed out and went to bed. A few days later I checked my email and I had a reply, thanking me for the letter. I replied back saying it was cool to get a reply even though it was probably some person at a desk tasked with replying to fan mail. Then I got another, saying that no, this was Peter lol I was floored. This man was so kind, and we continued to email back and forth, with him being genuinely interested in the goings on of other people trying to put good into the world. We became friends, and talked often on the phone, just chit chatting about our day. I learned of his love for making balloon animals, and teaching Tai Chi. He called me once when he was carrying in groceries, excited he had found the fruits he really liked. Told me all about a family of opossums living just outside of his back yard. He called me when he lost a family member and we talked for a long time about loss and life. He even spoke to my then boyfriend and told him that if he treated me wrong he was going to fly out here and set him straight lol We lost touch about 5 years ago, but only a few months ago I reached out again and we got to speak. I regret not reaching out more, and to find out about his death has just really got me tonight.
Peter, we never got to meet in person, but i really do consider you a friend, and you will be missed. Your views on life were amazing, and how you treated people with such kindness will always mean a lot to me, and everyone that had the joy of knowing you. Rest in peace, my good friend.
item.dc:creator: thecitrinewitch

Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Some of my Art! [OC] NO freaking AI!
item.description:
"The Royal Courier" I wanted to capture that float-y flying feeling I get when I watch a movie with flying.
"Fireball!" A cute little wizard! This is based off my DnD character who "says" they're a Fire Mage but really it's just matches.
"Gnome Trail" I want to be a little creature and scurry around collecting snacks. But there's no such thing as a free lunch so be wary.
"Little life in little puddles" Based on a hot sunny day I saw several birds splashing in a puddle. Except every time a car drove by the birds had to fly away. I wondered what life could grow in it if there wasn't so much traffic? Probably mosquitos.
"A message for you miss" Ghosts slain in unjust ways are Red. She holds a skull carefully in her arms, was it her friend, guardian or murderer? Unknown. All that is known in this moment is that a Raven can see her and it has a message.
"Fae Beacon" What could be so important to give away the Kingdoms location? The Fae didn't know but it garnered attention and incited action.
Okay... so you made it this far? You were wooed by my pretty art and fancy words? Would you like to buy an art print to support a super broke artist? My art site is here: www.pickledalice.com I sell prints, original art and custom art like pet portraits and people portraits! Dm me here or comment if you have any questions! And most importantly... drink some water. :3 And yes this is technically an AD! But I'm broke so wadda ya want.
Cat tax! Name: Myrtle the Squirtle.
item.dc:creator: PICKAPICKLEANYPICKLE

item.title: The bottom shelf memes are blooming beautifully this time of year.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
@someuserguy
Join for the games. Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. Join for the memes. We share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Follow the channel to be notified when me and Deaf Cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) go live, and you can contribute to her Temptations addiction.
I found my husband, our son, and myself 3 different 100 page sketchbooks, and we have now completed 2 out of 100 days of doodles with the family. I call this one "They'll never suspect a thing"
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: She is not a hero she is a Queen
item.dc:creator: Maroccan

item.title: Don't fall for the illusion of mind
item.description: Would you trust a Flight Simulator program to fly the plane you're on? Even the airlines won't do that - they still have pilots. So why would you trust a Conversation Simulator to reason for you? LLMs are nothing more than Word Predictors - or Token Predictors, if you want to be precise, which is why they have lateral applications. They take The Internet as input, determine which words are most likely to appear next, depending on context, and present that. You influence which path they take by which words you choose - as well as a little randomizer seed, so it never gets stuck, but also introduces a degree of imprecision and chance, so you won't get the *exact* same answer if you ask again. That's it No reasoning No awareness No ghost in the machine - unless you count the ghosts of all those internet discussions being blended together by ChatGPT. ...Just a word-predictor with a slot-machine plugin... I know we all want the Star Trek computer, but if you look closely, even *it* was simply a data-retrieval system, or a simulation system - at _no_ time did it ever offer an opinion. Even when addressed directly for advice, it was always phrased as a data retrieval or simulation instruction: "Computer! ...given the current spacial anomaly, calculate course corrections such that the ship is exposed to the least radiation, and display on-screen!" It was never "Computer! ...find the best way out of here!" The Computer was a tool, not an agent. Even though it had the power to create sentience, as it did with Moriarity, it doesn't have sentience itself. It would immediately self-destruct without a pang of emotion or regret, if you gave it the correct instruction. NOT alive. NOT sentient. A *tool*, not an agent.
item.dc:creator: ThePsychAutist

item.title: What Happened Today #118
item.description: ?️ Federal judges are blocking Trump at every turn, but he's auctioning off American democracy faster than they can stop him. While courts desperately defend constitutional protections for immigrants and strike down illegal tariffs, Trump hands out pardons to donors, extracts settlements from terrified corporations, and fires civil servants who won't play ball. The Constitution is losing to the cash register. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-holds-israel 2. https://go.govbrief.today/qatar-deal-not-final 3. https://go.govbrief.today/court-blocks-tariffs 4. https://go.govbrief.today/taco-trade-tariffs 5. https://go.govbrief.today/musk-leaves-government 6. https://go.govbrief.today/moderna-contract-canceled 7. https://go.govbrief.today/kennedy-bypasses-cdc 8. https://go.govbrief.today/hhs-medical-journals 9. https://go.govbrief.today/rubio-chinese-students 10. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-international-cap 11. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-pentagon-contracts 12. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-nominates-bove 13. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-issues-pardons 14. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-frees-petrova 15. https://go.govbrief.today/khalil-deportation-likely-unconstitutional 16. https://go.govbrief.today/migrant-returning-to-us 17. https://go.govbrief.today/humanitarian-parole-deportee 18. https://go.govbrief.today/dismissal-motion-kilmar 19. https://go.govbrief.today/continue-biden-programs 20. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-not-block-copyright-firing 21. https://go.govbrief.today/18f-appealing-mspb 22. https://go.govbrief.today/paramount-trump-15 23. https://go.govbrief.today/newark-airport-improvements Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/visibility-brigade-toolkit Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/dollar-general-action
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Anti-AI Reaction Image
item.description: I wanted this for my own use, but figured I’d make it available for everyone No amount of whining or excuses will change my mind. If you use GenAI, you’re trash and you should feel bad. I’m not going to engage with you morons beyond a downvote.
item.dc:creator: CritCat82

item.title: In 1973 an area of land near Nichinan City in Japan, was designated as “experimental forestry” and one of the experiments was to try and measure the effect of tree spacing on growth. 50 years later here is the result.
item.description: In 1973 an area of land near Nichinan City in Japan, was designated as “experimental forestry” and one of the experiments was to try and measure the effect of tree spacing on growth. 50 years later here is the result. As you can see from today’s images, the forest has taken on this bizarre shape because there are the same number of trees in each ring, but each ring is smaller as you get closer to the center. It is very noticeable that the trees closest to each other are smaller, while those on the outer rings are significantly taller with a larger crown diameter. Trees, as living beings, grow smaller when they are closer together, this happens due to the lack of space; furthermore, plants sense the presence of other plants near them and therefore grow according to the space they have available.
item.dc:creator: Joyika
